tasks.task_description: Audit current npm scripts vs README documentation
Standardize script naming conventions (dev, build, test, etc.)
Verify folder structure matches README documentation
Test all documented commands to ensure they work
Update README with accurate script descriptions and usage
Consolidate redundant scripts and improve script organization
Add missing scripts that should exist for a complete workflow
Ensure consistent build outputs and clean up build artifacts

description: Standardize npm scripts and folder structure, and ensure README accuracy
context: Identified inconsistent naming patterns: 'src' (api/server), 'src-ui' (react frontend), 'src-tauri' (desktop). Scripts also inconsistent: 'dev', 'dev:ui', 'tauri:dev'. Need consistent naming convention across folders and scripts.

Agreed on standardized script naming: remove ambiguous shortcuts like 'dev' and 'start', use explicit naming like 'dev:server', 'dev:ui', etc. Only 'build' remains as shortcut for building everything.
User approved implementation. Starting with folder renaming and configuration updates.
Completed folder renaming (src->src-server, src-tauri->src-desktop), updated package.json scripts, esbuild config, vite config, tsconfig, and tauri config. Cleaned up old dist directory.
Successfully tested build:server, build:ui, and build scripts. All work correctly with new folder structure and output directories.
Updated README with standardized script names, corrected folder structure, and accurate development workflow documentation.
